sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ حَيْدَرٌ مِيكَانِيكِيًّا فِي وَرْشَةِ سَيَّارَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Hajdar radi kao mehaničar u autoradionici.
sentences.translationEn: Haydar works as a mechanic in a car workshop.
He checks cars and fixes faults.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَحُ لِلزَّبَائِنِ مَا وَجَدَهُ بِلُغَةٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Objašnjava kupcima šta je pronašao jednostavnim jezikom.
sentences.translationEn: He explains to customers what he found in simple language.

sentences.arabic: الزَّبَائِنُ يَثِقُونَ بِهِ وَيَعُودُونَ إِلَيْهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Kupci mu vjeruju i uvijek se vraćaju njemu.
sentences.translationEn: Customers trust him and always come back to him.
